query:
SELECT 
  r.id AS report_id,
  sc.modality,
  r.status,
  r.unit_id,
  r.author_user_id,
  u.name AS doctor_name,
  un.name AS unit_name,
  bve.id AS billing_event_id,
  bve.doctor_price_applied,
  bve.doctor_amount_due,
  bve.modality_snapshot,
  bve.pricing_status
FROM reports r
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = r.author_user_id
LEFT JOIN units un ON un.id = r.unit_id
LEFT JOIN studies_cache sc ON sc.id = r.study_id
LEFT JOIN billing_visit_events bve ON bve.report_id = r.id
WHERE r.unit_id = 210001
  AND r.author_user_id = 1
  AND r.status IN ('signed', 'revised')
ORDER BY r.id DESC
LIMIT 5;
